understandingYourIdea.title: Understanding Your Idea
understandingYourIdea.description: We start by defining your vision, goals, and expectations.

structuredDevelopment.title: Structured Development
structuredDevelopment.description: Every step is planned, transparent, and aligned with your needs.

precisionBuild.title: Precision Build
precisionBuild.description: We focus on clean code, strong performance, and seamless functionality.

launchSupport.title: Launch & Support
launchSupport.description: Your project goes live - with ongoing support if needed.

closing.title: Turn Your Idea Into Something Real
closing.description: Let's turn your concept into a working digital product - structured, functional, and ready to launch.

hero.label: // SITE
hero.title: Build What You Imagine.
hero.subtitle: Launch What Matters.
hero.description: Custom web and digital solutions designed for individuals - fast, functional, and built with precision.

plans.label: // SITE
plans.title: Flexible Ways to Collaborate
plans.bodyPrimary: Whether you need a one-time solution or ongoing development support, we offer structured engagement options tailored to your scope and timeline.
plans.bodySecondary: Clear process. Transparent approach. No unnecessary complexity.

customWebsites.title: CUSTOM WEBSITES
customWebsites.description: Tailored, responsive websites designed to reflect your vision and work seamlessly across all devices.

webApplications.title: WEB APPLICATIONS
webApplications.description: Functional, scalable platforms built to handle real interactions, logic, and user workflows.

uiUxDesign.title: UI/UX DESIGN
uiUxDesign.description: Clear, intuitive interfaces designed for smooth navigation and effortless user experience.

ecommerceSolutions.title: E-COMMERCE SOLUTIONS
ecommerceSolutions.description: Online stores built for simplicity, performance, and a seamless buying experience.

landingPages.title: LANDING PAGES
landingPages.description: Focused, conversion-driven pages designed to communicate clearly and guide user action.

maintenanceSupport.title: MAINTENANCE & SUPPORT
maintenanceSupport.description: Ongoing updates, fixes, and improvements to keep your product stable and up to date.

solutions.label: // SITE
solutions.title: Digital Solutions, Designed Around You
solutions.bodyPrimary: We create tailored digital products that fit your goals - not templates, not shortcuts. Every project is built from the ground up to deliver performance, clarity, and long-term usability.
solutions.bodySecondary: From simple websites to complex platforms, we focus on what matters most: making your idea work seamlessly.

items.builtAroundIdea: Built around your idea - not pre-made templates
items.designedForIndividuals: Designed for individuals, not just businesses

selectedWork.title: Selected Work
selectedWork.description: Every project reflects a different idea, a different challenge, and a different solution. We focus on delivering results that are both functional and refined.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Thoughts, ideas, and perspectives on development, design, and digital solutions - simplified and relevant.

journalPage.heroDescription: From exploring hidden corners of iconic cities to understanding how to plan your journey more efficiently, each article is created to support both inspiration and decision-making.

contactThankYou.title: Thank you for reaching out to Travellio Global!
contactThankYou.messageReceived: Your message has been successfully received. Our team will review your inquiry carefully and respond shortly.
contactThankYou.appreciation: We appreciate your interest and look forward to assisting you.
contactThankYou.prompt: Return to the previous page or:

requestForm.successMessage1: Your request for our service has been successfully submitted. Our team will review the information provided and get in touch with you shortly to discuss the next steps and how we can assist you.

notFoundPage.title: This Destination Doesn’t Exist
notFoundPage.messagePrimary: The page you’re looking for seems to have taken a different route.
notFoundPage.messageSecondary: It may have moved — or perhaps it never existed at all. Either way, your journey continues.
notFoundPage.prompt: Return to the previous page or:

notFound.title: 404 — Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you tried to reach isn’t here.

cookiePopup.title: Cookie Notice
cookiePopup.text: We use cookies to keep things working as expected and to better understand how visitors interact with the site.
